# Sugammadex Sodium 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Sugammadex Sodium 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Sugammadex Sodium</strong> 目前有 <strong>29 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Sugammadex Sodium 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Reversal of neuromuscular blockade induced by rocuronium or vecuronium in adults. For the paediatric population: sugammadex is only recommended for routine reversal of rocuronium induced blockade in...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>breast fibrocystic disease（98.5%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（98.4%）</li>
<li>peripheral arterial disease（98.1%）</li>
<li>blunt duct adenosis of breast（97.8%）</li>
<li>apocrine adenosis of breast（97.8%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（97.5%）</li>
<li>tendinitis（97.4%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（97.4%）</li>
<li>benign mammary dysplasia（97.4%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（97.3%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（97.3%）</li>
<li>epiglottitis（97.3%）</li>
<li>ischemic disease（97.2%）</li>
<li>angiodysplasia（97.2%）</li>
<li>idiopathic granulomatous myositis（97.2%）</li>
<li>myositis fibrosa（97.2%）</li>
<li>hemoglobinopathy（97.2%）</li>
<li>fibrocartilaginous embolism（97.1%）</li>
<li>venous thromboembolism（97.1%）</li>
<li>breast adenosis（97.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/sugammadex-sodium/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
